title: A pilot and AT controllers reported a UFO near Pirassununga-SP [1972]

text_preview:
DEC 14th, 1972. TWR / APP-RADAR SBSP [Control Tower and Approach Control of the São Paulo Airport]

## Translation of the report [by J.V.R.F. 2TEN ESP CTA / Head of ACC / TWR / APP-RADAR SBSP]

“At approximately 16:20Z, TWR-KP [Control Tower of the Campinas-SP Airport] warned that it spotted an unidentified object in the western sector of Campinas-SP. At 16:42Z, the VP-232 aircraft B-111 prefix PP-SRT, having taken off from SBSP / SBBR FL 280 [from Congonhas-SP Airport to Brasília-DF Airport, at 28,000 altitude level] was consulted by APP SBSP [São Paulo Airport Approach Control] on the possib
summary: On Dec 14 1972, ATC controllers and a commercial pilot tracked a rounded metallic UFO near Pirassununga-SP at ~40,000 ft; the pilot photographed it and it moved away when approached.
